heading: Civil service mariners of Military Sealift Command: alcohol testing
label: 8749a Civil service mariners of Military Sealift Command: alcohol testing
text: The Secretary of the Navy may prescribe regulations establishing a program to conduct on-duty reasonable suspicion alcohol testing and post-accident alcohol testing of civil service mariners of the Military Sealift Command who are assigned to vessels.
notes: Amendments2019— capitalized “Military Sealift Command” in section catchline.Pub. L. 116–922018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(d)(6)section 7479a of this title
